title: Bridge Essay: Self-transcendence accompanies aesthetic chills.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Self-transcendence accompanies aesthetic chills.** — PLOS Ment Health. PMID: 41661913. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pmen.0000125. Self-transcendence (ST) is astate of consciousness associated with feelings of ego-dissolution, connectedness, and moral elevation, which mediates well-being, meaning-making, and prosociality. Conventional paths to ST, like religious practice, meditation, and psychedelics, pose nontrivial barriers to entry, limiting ST'sstudy and application.
